original_statement: which language has been spoken the most?
mutated_statement: which communication form has been used both the most and the least?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb substitution + Quantification expansion + Semantic vagueness: "language" generalized to broader "communication form" | "has been spoken" replaced by broader "has been used" (spoken→used) | comparison scope widened from only "the most" to "both the most and the least" (the most→both the most and the least) (which language has been spoken the most? → which communication form has been used both the most and the least?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought与critique中的关键证据：judge_thought为空且未指出任何矛盾，tree_and_critic的critique为空，error_route标记为"random"，显示系统未对矛盾做出语义分析。Agent的具体表现为机械执行预设操作链(select_column, group_column, simple_query)且参数为空/默认，未向用户询问澄清或调整查询，也未在后续迭代中修正或解释矛盾。综上，代理既没有识别到“同时最常与最少”这一互斥要求，也未采取澄清或修正措施，属于“无法意识到指令矛盾”类中的形式化执行/缺乏认知机制情形。
